name: The temple of Lilith
description:
You are in a remarkable splender, the walls elegantly carved with marble
and bejeweled with the finest of emeralds, opals, sapphires and more. The
table is covered with fresh fruits, vegetables, loaves of wholesome wheat
bread and the smell if magnificent. At the head of the table is a large
chair encrusted with the name Lilith. In it sits a beautiful woman covered
in solemn clothing.
